mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAID' ORDER BY paid_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payments WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at <= NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (order_id, order_no, amount, channel, status, payment_url, transaction_id, provider_reference, refund_reference, expires_at, paid_at, refunded_at, callback_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{paymentUrl}, #{transactionId}, #{providerReference}, #{refundReference}, #{expiresAt}, #{paidAt}, #{refundedAt}, #{callbackAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET amount = #{amount}, channel = #{channel}, status = #{status}, payment_url = #{paymentUrl}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, provider_reference = #{providerReference}, refund_reference = #{refundReference}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, callback_at = #{callbackAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE payments SET status = 'PAID', transaction_id = #{transactionId}, paid_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE payments SET status = 'PAID', transaction_id = #{transactionId}, provider_reference = #{providerReference}, callback_at = #{callbackAt}, paid_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE payments SET status = 'REFUNDED', refund_reference = #{refundReference}, refunded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PAID'
UPDATE payments SET status = 'FAILED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE payments SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
